negative_prompt_default: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, low quality, jpeg artifacts

cards.name: Red Tape
cards.art_prompt: A bureaucratic illustration: a spool of red tape wrapped around a stamped document, paper texture, inked lines, subtle shading, official stamp marks, no text.
cards.notes: Starter example card for the gallery.

cards.name: Audit
cards.rules_text: Apply 1 Exposed to ALL enemies. Gain 4 Block.
cards.art_prompt: A stern-looking stamp and a checklist clipboard over layered paperwork, sepia ink illustration, paper grain, official vibe, no text.

cards.name: Rubber Stamp
cards.rules_text: At the start of your turn, draw 1 and gain 1 Muscle.
cards.art_prompt: A heavy rubber stamp pressed onto paper with a bold circular imprint shape (blank, no letters), ink illustration, paper texture, dramatic lighting, no text.
